name: Sky Striker Ace - Raye
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>閃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>刀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>姫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－レイ
desc: (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Sky Striker Ace" monster from your Extra Deck to the Extra Monster Zone. While this card is in your GY, if a face-up "Sky Striker Ace" Link Monster you control is destroyed by battle, or leaves the field because of an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon this card. You can only use each effect of "Sky Striker Ace - Raye" once per turn.
mnst_eff: (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Sky Striker Ace" monster from your Extra Deck to the Extra Monster Zone. While this card is in your GY, if a face-up "Sky Striker Ace" Link Monster you control is destroyed by battle, or leaves the field because of an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon this card. You can only use each effect of "Sky Striker Ace - Raye" once per turn.
eff: (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Sky Striker Ace" monster from your Extra Deck to the Extra Monster Zone. While this card is in your GY, if a face-up "Sky Striker Ace" Link Monster you control is destroyed by battle, or leaves the field because of an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon this card. You can only use each effect of "Sky Striker Ace - Raye" once per turn.

action: Activates if other cards leave the field
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
